venues.name: The Restaurant
venues.description: Main dining room. Open-seating for breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Mediterranean-inspired menus blended with destination-driven regional dishes. All passengers can be accommodated simultaneously. Complimentary.

venues.name: La Terrazza
venues.description: Italian restaurant on Deck 7. Daytime open-seating buffet; evening reservations-only Italian à la carte (four courses) with handmade pasta, seafood, and regional wines. Indoor and alfresco terrace seating. Complimentary.

venues.name: The Grill
venues.description: 'Gourmet dining under the stars.' Evening Hot Rocks experience — guests cook prime steaks, seafood, and marinated vegetables on heated volcanic lava-stone plates. Heat lamps and blankets available on polar expedition voyages. Daytime casual poolside fare. Complimentary.

venues.name: La Dame
venues.description: French fine-dining restaurant in partnership with Relais & Châteaux. Intimate room with 12 tables, Relais & Châteaux china, and dark-wood décor. Six-course dinner with wine pairings. No jacket required — Silver Cloud maintains an elegant-casual dress code throughout. Dinner only; supplement $60 per person.

venues.name: In-Suite Dining
venues.description: Complimentary 24-hour butler-delivered in-suite dining. Extensive menu covering full dinner service, breakfast, and light meals for every suite.
